mode_of_action_summary: Glyphosate inhibits EPSP synthase enzyme in the shikimate pathway, blocking amino acid synthesis. It is absorbed through leaves and translocated to roots, killing entire weed including underground parts.

weed_behavior.systemic_kill: Kills weed from leaf to root including underground rhizomes
weed_behavior.regrowth_control: Prevents regrowth in most annual and perennial weeds

urdu: ہر قسم کی گھاس ختم کرنی ہے
کھیت میں پرانی جڑی بوٹی کھڑی ہے
بوائی سے پہلے کھیت صاف کرنا ہے
punjabi: ہر قسم دی گھاس ختم کرنی اے
بوائی توں پہلاں کھیت صاف کرنا اے
roman_urdu: har qisam ki ghas khatam karni hai
field clean karna hai before sowing

search_keywords: ہر قسم دی گھاس مار دوا

application_details.method: Spray only on actively growing green weeds
application_details.coverage: Uniform coverage required for effective absorption

water_management.before_application: Weeds should be actively growing with moisture
water_management.after_application: Avoid irrigation or rain for 6 hours

safety: Do NOT spray on crop plants
farmer_benefits: کھیت مکمل صاف ہو جاندا اے
خبال جڑ توں ختم ہو جاندا اے

multilingual_description.english: Non-selective herbicide for complete weed control before sowing or in non-crop areas.
multilingual_description.urdu: ہر قسم کی جڑی بوٹی ختم کرنے والی دوا جو صرف بوائی سے پہلے استعمال ہوتی ہے۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: ہر قسم دی گھاس ختم کرن والی دوا جو صرف بوائی توں پہلاں استعمال ہندی اے۔

critical_usage_warning: Do not use on standing crops
Non-selective herbicide will kill all green plants
Use only for pre-sowing or directed spray
embedding_text: Roundup 48 SL herbicide contains glyphosate and is used as a non selective total weed killer for pre sowing land preparation orchard floor and non crop areas. It controls annual and perennial weeds including khabbal and dhoob by killing plants from leaf to root.
